rule_text: Whenever any AP private person/firm contracts with Government to supply stores or execute work, he/it shall be required to give SECURITY for the due fulfilment of the contract — UNLESS exempted by competent authority; suitable security provisions must be incorporated in the agreement (read with Articles 128 and 166); reference to the agreement must be recorded in the Register of Security Deposits.
verification_method: Check tender contract has Security Deposit clause + Register of Security Deposits entry; verify HOD-exemption order if SD waived

rule_text: Acceptable forms of AP contractor security: (1) Cash (no interest paid by Government), (2) Promissory notes/Municipal Debentures/Port Trust Bonds/State Financial Corp Bonds/APSEB bonds (accepted at 5% below market price OR face value, whichever is less, endorsed in favour of EE/PWD or Disbursing Officer/Electricity or DFO/Forest), (3) Government securities, (4) Post Office Savings Bank deposits, (5) Post Office Cash Certificates, (6) other prescribed forms.
verification_method: Check Security Deposit form matches one of the prescribed types; promissory notes must be endorsed properly
